items.title: Azerbaijan furious with Iran as war spills over its border
items.description: President Ilham Aliyev says drone strikes are an "act of terror" as he places the armed forces on high alert.

items.title: Hungary confirms it is holding seven Ukrainian bank workers and $80m
items.description: The bank said they were in two vans carrying $80m (£60m) worth of cash between Austria and Ukraine.

items.title: US and Venezuela agree to resume diplomatic ties after Maduro capture
items.description: The US said the two sides would make joint efforts to promote stability after the US seized Maduro and his wife.

items.title: Israel strikes Beirut after evacuation warning sparks panic
items.description: Huge traffic jams form after the unprecedented warning for people to leave the Hezbollah stronghold, as Israel steps up its strikes across Lebanon.

items.title: Anthropic vows to sue Pentagon over supply chain risk label
items.description: The supply chain risk designation of the artificial intelligence firm is a first for a US company.
